subject: Recipe update for Optical service
commit_message:
Recipe update for Optical service

Recipe updates for orchestration of OTN services in Optical domain

Change-Id: I65c2ac46637a717257167128422e31830bd51c83
Issue-ID: SO-2773
Signed-off-by: Srinivasan Ramanathan <srinivasan.ramanathan2@us.fujitsu.com>
